caption: A man with a dark beard and short-cropped hair is seated in a recording studio against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt with a black logo on the chest that reads "Stay Wild". He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing, with his gaze shifting slightly. In the initial frames, he looks forward and to the side with an open-mouthed smile. As the sequence progresses, his expression remains joyful, and he turns his head slightly more toward the right of the frame while continuing to smile. The camera remains stationary, capturing a medium close-up of the man as he reacts with amusement.
